events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Saint Francis Memorial for client 1002. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 600 mg/meal, carbs 45–75 g/meal. Prefers Vietnamese; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: microwave. 7 meals/week, zone Excelsior.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Fresh Spring Rolls with Chicken
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 41 g outside 45–75 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Beef Pho with Rice Noodles
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'cardiovascular': meal lacks 'heart-healthy' tag.

events.title: Matched: Steamed Rice Rolls with Mushrooms
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 423/600 mg ✓, carbs 46 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Tofu and Vegetable Curry with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 439/600 mg ✓, carbs 54 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Lemongrass Chicken with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 458/600 mg ✓, carbs 50 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1002 added to route R-EXCE-1 (Excelsior), delivery 2026-07-21, window 14:00–16:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1002: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
